subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear macroâstructure with introduction, methodology, results, and reflection sections
Effective use of headings, subâheadings, numbered steps, and tables for navigation
Descriptive title framing the explorationâs focus clearly
weaknesses: Lengthy digressions and repeated definitions reduce conciseness
Misplaced images, mis-numbered lists, and LaTeX artifacts interrupt professionalism
Duplicated matrices and inconsistent captioning hinder logical flow
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration is coherent and logically developed, with a clear structure that guides the reader (coherence and organization at band 3). However, repeated background information, lengthy ethical sections, and formatting inconsistencies prevent tighter focus and conciseness, placing it below the top band. A score of 3 reflects strong organization and adequate relevance, while acknowledging areas for improved polish and brevity.

strengths: Appropriate use of key mathematical terms (e.g., adjacency matrix, Euclidean distance)
Inclusion of matrices, graphs, tables, and a route diagram to support explanations
Effective comparison table illustrating algorithmic trade-offs
weaknesses: Inconsistent notation (duplicate indices, mis-rendered infinity) and LaTeX errors
Missing definitions of variables in recurrence relations and heuristic formulas
Logical gaps linking capacity/time-window violations back to algorithm choices
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical language and notation are present but inconsistent, and representationsâthough effectiveâlack the precision and clarity of a higher band. Logical structure is understandable but has minor gaps. The overall performance aligns with band 2, meriting a score of 2.

strengths: Selection of a self-devised data set and comparison of three algorithms shows independent thinking
Ethical reflections and AI/ML future proposals demonstrate a clear personal approach
Inclusion of capacity constraints and suggestions for future methods indicate creativity and initiative
weaknesses: Creative elements remain relatively surface-level and not fully innovative
Personal approach is clear but lacks the originality for the highest band
Initiatives (e.g., driver welfare constraint) are noted but not deeply integrated into the core analysis
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work shows significant evidence of independent thinking and a clear personal approach (band 2). Creativity and initiative are evident but not sustained at an exceptional level, making band 2 appropriate and yielding a score of 2.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on environmental, ethical, and computational limitations
Thoughtful analysis of distance versus computation time trade-offs
Clear evaluation of algorithmic outcomes with suggestions for alternative methods
weaknesses: Reflection lacks deep, data-driven critique and quantified improvement plans
Conclusion restates findings without adding new insights
Limited critical analysis of how results could inform future parameter choices
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection is present and thoughtful, with clear evaluation of outcomes (band 2). However, it does not reach the depth or comprehensive critical insight required for band 3. A score of 2 reflects meaningful but not substantial critical reflection.

strengths: Relevant application of graph theory, TSP heuristics, and adjacency matrices
Correct use of Euclidean distance and mean/variance calculations
Solid understanding demonstrated through mostly accurate computations
weaknesses: Mathematical depth is limited (no proofs of optimality or advanced complexity)
Minor notation slips and unexplained rounding errors occur
Lacks fully comprehensive application of course-level mathematics
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The mathematics used are appropriate and correctly applied, showing good understanding with minor errors (band 3). While the exploration uses relevant techniques, it does not demonstrate the depth or sophistication for higher bands. A mid-level score of 3 accurately reflects its strengths and limitations.

strandSelections.reasoning: Explanatory sentences accompany almost every calculation, yet minor logical gaps occur (e.g., capacity violation shown but not linked back to algorithm choice).  The narrative is understandable but lacks the sustained clarity and precision characteristic of higher bands.

Calculations of distances, mean/variance and algorithmic cost are mostly correct; a few notation slips and unexplained rounding occur but do not invalidate results.  This shows good understanding with minor errors, matching the 3-mark band.

Matrices, graphs, tables and a route diagram are provided and generally support the discussion.  Although the graphics are simple, they are appropriate and integrated, achieving an effective (but not outstanding) use of multiple representations.

The student structures the exploration with an introduction, methodology, results, and reflection.  Ideas generally flow in a sensible order (problem â model â algorithms â results â implications), so the reader can follow the development without major confusion.  However, lengthy digressions (e.g., extended environmental ethics sections) interrupt the mathematical thread and some paragraphs repeat earlier information, preventing the work from reaching the tight, polished coherence required for the highest band.

Inclusion of capacity/time-window constraints, basic statistics, and future-tech discussion show some creativity and initiative; however, these elements remain relatively surface-level, aligning with a âgoodâ rather than âexceptionalâ level.

Trade-off analysis between distance and computation time and acknowledgment of algorithmic limitations constitute thoughtful analysis, yet the commentary stops short of deep, data-driven critique expected for the highest band.

The student checks capacity and time-window violations and suggests alternative methods, giving a clear evaluation of outcomes and implications, but does not propose a quantified improvement plan, so evaluation remains clear rather than comprehensive.

The student reflects on environmental, ethical, and computational limitations, exhibiting meaningful but not deeply critical engagement.  Reflection is present throughout the report, fitting the âmeaningful reflectionâ descriptor.

Mathematical terms such as âadjacency matrixâ, âEuclidean distanceâ, and algorithmic recurrence relations are used, but notation is sometimes inconsistent (e.g., duplicate index symbols, mis-rendered infinity, $a_{ij}$ typos).  This indicates partial but not consistent control of mathematical language.

Creating a hypothetical network, coding in Python and adding ethical reflections illustrate a clear personal approach.  The work is personalised but not truly innovative or original enough for the top band.

The text is verbose; identical definitions of TSP and repeated algorithm descriptions appear in several sections.  While most material is on topic, superfluous theoretical commentary and lengthy ethical digressions lower conciseness, fitting the âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elementsâ description.

Graph theory, TSP heuristics, adjacency matrices, simple statistics and basic calculus are all relevant to the problem and applied appropriately, though depth is limited; hence the work fits ârelevant mathematics used appropriately,â not âeffectivelyâ or higher.

The student selects a self-devised data set and compares three algorithms, showing choices that go beyond textbook replication.  This demonstrates noticeable, though not outstanding, independent thinking.

Headings, sub-headings, numbered steps and tables give a clear macro-structure and the reader can locate each part easily.  Nevertheless, occasional misplaced images, mis-numbered lists, and LaTeX artefacts reduce the overall professionalism, so the organization is good rather than exceptional.

Most mathematics lies within HL discrete topics but remains elementary (no proof of optimality, limited complexity).  Thus mathematics is commensurate with course level, but not âfullyâ or âcomprehensivelyâ so.

annotations.comment: The title is clear and descriptive, effectively framing the explorationâs focus on minimizing travel distance and maximizing efficiency.
The introduction repeats general logistics background twice; consider condensing to focus immediately on the mathematical problem and research question.
Notation for infinity appears as ââ\inftyââ in text; use consistent LaTeX $$\infty$$ to avoid OCR-induced duplication.
The adjacency matrix illustration is helpful, but the caption could more explicitly link matrix entries to the sample network distances.
Definitions of Eulerian and Hamiltonian paths are repeated later; consider referencing earlier sections to improve conciseness.
The figure on page 4 lacks a numbered caption; add a clear caption and refer to it explicitly in the text for better navigation.
âDefining the Objectiveâ heading appears midâdiscussion of graphs; reposition or relabel to maintain logical flow.
The dataset table is clear, yet the rationale for chosen distances is not discussed; reflect on how realâworld data could differ.
The assumptions list uses misrendered inline math (e.g., â1_{\cdot}â); correct LaTeX errors to maintain clarity of each assumption.
Stepâbyâstep algorithms lack pseudo-code formatting; present key steps in numbered pseudocode blocks to improve mathematical communication.
Bullet numbering in the Nearest Neighbor Heuristic section is inconsistent, with overlines and mixed symbols; standardize numbering.
Listing strengths and limitations side by side gives clear comparative insight; this aids readersâ understanding of each algorithmâs tradeâoffs.
The BellmanâHeldâKarp recurrence relation omits explanation of set S and indices âiâ, âkâ; add descriptive text to define these variables.

Equation $$d[j]=
\min(d[j],d[i]+a_{ij})$$ is correctly stated, reinforcing the algorithmic update step.
The Nearest Neighbor formula $$a_{ij}=\min_{k\notin V}a_{ik}$$ lacks context on the set V; explicitly define V to avoid ambiguity.
The adjacency matrix table on page 11 is clearly laid out, providing a solid basis for algorithmic computation.
Row and column headers in the matrix include unnumbered blank cells; remove or merge these to enhance presentation coherence.
The Euclidean distance formula is correctly stated as $$d=\sqrt{(x_2-x_1)^2+(y_2-y_1)^2}$$, reinforcing mathematical rigor.
The capacity constraint violation is noted, but no strategy is proposed to adjust routes; suggest adding algorithmic response to constraint breaches.
Time window violation for Customer C is identified, but the discussion lacks calculation of actual arrival time; include timeâdistance conversion.
Large combined adjacency/distance matrix on page 14 repeats information from earlier pages; consider summarizing rather than duplicating.
The fuel consumption model $$F(d,w)=a\cdot d+b\cdot w^2$$ is a good bridge to calculus, but the choice of parameters a and b needs empirical justification.
Algorithm comparison table effectively uses multiple representations, supporting an accessible summary of distances across methods.
The mean distance calculation $$\mu=\frac{168}{3}=56\text{ km}$$ is correct and concisely communicated.
The variance formula is correctly applied, but the interpretation of standard deviation lacks connection to realâworld route variability.
The summary bullet on dynamic programming vs heuristic tradeâoffs succinctly highlights variability and efficiency.
Heuristic step description on page 18 omits explicit cumulative distance calculation; include segmentâbyâsegment sums for transparency.
The results presentation table on page 19 labels Dijkstraâs distance as 'N/A'; clarify why TSP distance is not computed for that method.
Environmental discussion links route optimization to sustainability and shows meaningful reflection on broader impacts.
In ethical considerations, the suggestion to include driver welfare as a constraint demonstrates personal engagement and awareness.
AI and ML future section shows creative thinking by proposing reinforcement learning for dynamic routing environments.
Conclusion restates findings but adds little new insight; deepen reflection by evaluating limitations and suggesting quantifiable future work.
Suggestions for future methods (ACO, GA, MILP) demonstrate initiative and extend the exploration beyond core algorithms.
References lack uniform formatting (e.g., inconsistent italicizing, missing DOIs); apply a consistent citation style for professionalism.
